summary: Iteration 26 - NeoNoble Ramp 100% Operational. All features verified: (1) verify-deposit correctly credits NENO to internal wallet + creates transaction record + sends notification, (2) blockchain listener actively monitors hot wallet for incoming NENO transfers, (3) All 6 tabs present on /neno-exchange page, (4) Sell shows 'Saldo NENO insufficiente' for large amounts (NOT generic error), (5) All CRUD operations (buy/sell/swap) work with settlement hashes.
critical_code_review_comments: verify-deposit endpoint now properly: (a) credits NENO to user's internal wallet, (b) creates transaction record in neno_transactions, (c) sends notification via notify_trade_executed
blockchain_listener.py has monitor_hot_wallet() that scans ALL incoming NENO transfers to hot wallet address
Hot wallet monitor started and running (confirmed in backend logs)
MongoDB onchain_deposits collection has verified deposit with credited=True
MongoDB neno_transactions collection has onchain_deposit record with status=completed
Admin NENO balance correctly reflects credited deposits (~9679.37 NENO)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified full operational status of NeoNoble Ramp. Key verifications: (1) verify-deposit with already processed tx hash 0x4aba1b5b...ceb7 returns 'Transazione gia processata', (2) verify-deposit with fake hash returns error, (3) All exchange operations (buy/sell/swap) work with settlement hashes, (4) Deposita tab shows QR code and platform wallet 0x18CE1930820d5e1B87F37a8a2F7Cf59E7BF6da4E, (5) Sell with insufficient balance shows specific error 'Saldo NENO insufficiente: X disponibile', (6) MongoDB collections verified: onchain_deposits has credited=True, neno_transactions has onchain_deposit type.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/neno-exchange/transactions: PASS - Returns transactions including onchain_deposit type

frontend_ui.All 6 tabs visible: PASS - Compra, Vendi, Swap, Deposita, Off-Ramp, Crea Token
frontend_ui.Sell valid amount: PASS - Shows success with settlement hash and BSCScan link

mongodb_verification.onchain_deposits collection: PASS - Has verified deposit with credited=True
mongodb_verification.neno_transactions collection: PASS - Has onchain_deposit record with status=completed

mocked_apis.note: Using real Alchemy BSC RPC for on-chain operations
